title: Security Result
description: Result schema for the security role. The security auditor reviews for auth bypass, injection, secrets exposure, and fail-open logic using read-only tools and approved scan commands.

category.description: Security category (e.g., injection, authentication, authorization, cryptography, secrets, configuration).

evidence.description: Code snippet or scan output proving the issue.

cwe.description: CWE identifier if applicable (e.g., CWE-89, CWE-327).

findings.description: Security findings with category, severity, and evidence.

scan_commands_run.description: Security scan commands executed during the review.

examples.summary: Critical algorithm confusion vulnerability in JWT validation. The decode call uses HS256 but the key is an RSA public key, allowing token forgery.

findings.issue: JWT algorithm confusion: jwt.decode() uses algorithms=['HS256'] but the key is an RSA public key. An attacker can forge tokens by signing with the public key as an HMAC secret.
